TokenMeter v0.1.0 is the first public preview of the native macOS menu bar app for local AI coding usage.

## Highlights

- Track local Claude Code, Codex, and OpenCode token usage in one menu bar view.
- Estimate per-model cost across daily, weekly, monthly, and all-time periods.
- Monitor Codex quota windows and reset timing.
- Inspect mixed-source totals through per-source hover details.
- Install a universal build that supports both Apple Silicon and Intel Macs.

## Requirements

- macOS 13 Ventura or later.
- `TokenMeter-v0.1.0-macos-universal.zip` contains `arm64` and `x86_64` slices.
- Use `SHA256SUMS` to verify the downloaded archive.

## Signing and Gatekeeper

This release is not signed with an Apple Developer ID and is not notarized by Apple. Gatekeeper may block the first launch. Control-click `TokenMeter.app` in Finder, choose **Open**, and confirm **Open**. Do not disable Gatekeeper globally.

## Privacy

TokenMeter scans supported logs and SQLite databases locally and read-only. It does not upload token usage, prompts, logs, or derived cost data.
